overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand Gothic great hall rendered in a game engine, featuring floating candles, long dining tables filled with people, and warm sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows. The scene evokes a magical institutional dining hall with elaborate stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and Gothic architecture

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from an elevated balcony overlooking the dining hall

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone column in the right foreground supporting the balcony
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air throughout the hall ceiling
tall ornate stained glass windows at the far end of the hall casting colored light
pointed Gothic arches framing the windows and lining the hall
rows of long wooden dining tables with benches occupied by diners

segments.scene_description: A stationary elevated view captures a magnificent Gothic great hall filled with diners seated at long wooden tables. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space alongside warm golden sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows at the far end. The camera observes from behind a stone pillar on a balcony, overlooking the bustling but orderly dining scene below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, elevated perspective that captures the grand scale and magical atmosphere of a Gothic great hall. It begins from a vantage point behind a stone pillar on a balcony, overlooking a bustling dining scene below. The camera observes hundreds of floating candles that illuminate the space, while warm golden sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows at the far end of the hall. The view remains fixed, emphasizing the orderly movement of diners seated at long wooden tables within the elaborate stone architecture.
